fieldValues.value: RFC-004 Change F: Define portable constraints

Define portable constraints for required/nullability, numeric bounds, string length and pattern, array cardinality and uniqueness, enum/literal values, scalar format, map key/value shape, and target-supported cardinality.
Cross-field and conditional validation remain out of scope until a later semantic rule notation exists.

sourceRefs.note: Structured RFC-004 process record derived from the RFC-004 proposal content.
